info.name: athma-ce Backend API Collection
info.description: Postman collection covering Auth, Foundation, and Clinical services for local development. Includes patient management, identity verification, consent management (GDPR-compliant), and audit trail endpoints.

exec: // sanitize tokens to avoid CR/LF issues (no hard fail)

item.name: User Facilities
item.description: User-facility mapping and access management endpoints

item.name: Departments
item.description: Department management endpoints - Functional units within facilities

query.description: Filter by department type (opd, ipd, radiology, etc.)

item.name: Wards (IPD)
item.description: Ward management endpoints - IPD bed groupings

query.description: Filter by ward type (general, icu, nicu, picu, isolation, maternity)

item.name: Beds (IPD)
item.description: Bed management endpoints - Patient assignment and tracking

query.description: Filter by status (available, occupied, maintenance, reserved)

item.name: Clinics (OPD)
item.description: Clinic management endpoints - OPD consultation room groupings

item.name: Clinical Service - Patients
item.description: Patient management endpoints - Create, search, update patient records with identity management

query.description: Search by name, phone, email, or national ID

item.name: Clinical Service - Patient Documents
item.description: Patient document management - Identity verification and document tracking

item.name: Clinical Service - Patient History
item.description: Patient change history and audit trail

query.description: Filter by specific field (firstName, lastName, phoneNumber, email, etc.)
Filter by change type (staff_update, patient_request, system_correction, migration)

body.raw:
{
  "consentType": "general_data_processing",
  "purpose": "Patient registration - General data processing consent",
  "description": "I consent to the collection, storage, and processing of my personal health information",
  "captureMethod": "digital_signature",
  "signatureUrl": "s3://zeal-signatures/patient-consent-123.png",
  "documentUrl": "s3://zeal-documents/consent-forms/general-data-processing.pdf"
}

{
  "consentType": "surgical_procedure",
  "purpose": "Consent for appendectomy surgery",
  "description": "Patient consents to surgical removal of appendix under general anesthesia",
  "captureMethod": "digital_signature",
  "signatureUrl": "s3://zeal-signatures/patient-surgery-consent.png",
  "witnessedBy": "{{userId}}",
  "witnessSignatureUrl": "s3://zeal-signatures/witness-signature.png",
  "linkedEntityType": "surgery",
  "linkedEntityId": "surgery-id-here",
  "documentUrl": "s3://zeal-documents/consent-forms/surgical-consent.pdf"
}

query.description: Filter by category (data_processing, treatment, communication, etc.)
Check if patient has active consent for this type
Get consents expiring in next N days
